title: Sling racer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:slingracer.jpg|thumb|Sling racers in a rocky canyon.]]
'''Sling racers''' were modified [[airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] very similar to [[Podracing/Legends|podracers]], with repulsors only being used to hover above ground. Another similarity was that each pilot had to concentrate more on operating and controlling the individual jets and engines, thus concentrating less on the actual racecourse.
==Characteristics==
The speeders were built from ultra-light alloys and ceramics to be as lightweight as possible, typically 200 [[kilogram/Legends|kg]]. Each could have as much as 6 small repulsorlift drive units individually throttled; number of drives depended onthe pilot's status and experience.<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

They were maneuverable with wing and airfoil mechanics, taking advantage of the canyon winds; the pilot adjusted them accordingly to the currents as well as individually throttled the drives.<ref name="guide" />

The crudeness and difficulty of maneuvering was part of the challenge. Racers were equipped with [[ejector seat/Legends|ejector seats]] and maneuvering jets, used only in emergency.<ref name="guide" />

==Variants==
Amateur racers were slower, more refined (usually with maneuvering jets), with more protective measures. On [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] one could be rented for 15 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]/hour.<ref name="guide" />

Two popular models of Sling racer were the [[SkyFoil Sling Racer]] (for amateurs) and [[AirDomination Sling Racer]], both of which were manufactured by [[Bespin Motors/Legends|Bespin Motors]].<ref name="guide" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
